description: A certification that taught me how to use Python as a server side, backend language.
A certification that taught me the basics of JavaScript, some more advanced JavaScript and how to use it in Frontend Development.
A certification in the basics of HTML coding and CSS styling that allowed me to form a foundation for UI/UX design.
A comprehensive certification introducing me to the basic syntax, core concepts and application of C#.
Passed the  DP-203 exam relating to Data Storage, Data Processing, Data Security and Optimization using specific Azure skills.
Passed the DP-900 exam relating to core data concepts and related Microsoft Azure data services.
A post graduate certificate allowing me to teach Natural Sciences, Life Sciences, Mathematics as well as Physical Sciences for Grade 8 - 12 learners.
Passed my degree Cum Laude, with 2 years of Chemistry included.
7 Distinctions, including Afrikaans, English, Life Orientation, Mathematics, Life Science, Accounting and Computer Applications Technology. My 8th subject was Physical Sciences.
